User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the Falaah application, distinguishing between Santri (Student), Pengajar (Teacher), and Wali (Parent) roles, and tracking their progress and linked accounts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for authentication.

role.description: The role of the user within the application, determining access and functionality.

whatsapp.description: The WhatsApp number of the user for communication.

participantId.description: The unique participant ID assigned to the student.

rank.description: The current gamified rank of the user, based on their total experience points.

totalExp.description: The cumulative experience points (EXP) earned by the user across all activities.

streak.description: The number of consecutive days the user has completed their Wajib (obligatory) prayers.

linkedStudentIds.description: An array of User IDs of 'Santri' (students) that this 'Wali' (parent) user is linked to for monitoring purposes.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user account details were updated.

IbadahLog.title: IbadahLog
IbadahLog.description: Records the daily religious activities and achievements of a 'Santri' (student).

id.description: Unique identifier for the IbadahLog entity.

santriId.description: Reference to the User ID of the Santri.

logDate.description: The specific date for which this ibadah log was recorded.

HafalanSubmission.title: HafalanSubmission
HafalanSubmission.description: Records individual 'Setoran Hafalan Tahfidz' submissions by a 'Santri' (student).
